mapper.select: select id, admin_id as "adminId", post_id as "postId", news_title as "newsTitle", news_content as "newsContent", news_source_url as "newsSourceUrl", news_category as "newsCategory", news_type as "newsType", to_char(published_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as "publishedAt", to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as "createdDatetime", to_char(updated_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as "updatedDatetime" from tbl_news order by created_datetime desc
select post_id from tbl_news where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_news ( admin_id, post_id, news_title, news_content, news_source_url, news_category, news_type, published_at ) values ( #{adminId}, #{postId}, #{newsTitle}, #{newsContent}, #{newsSourceUrl}, #{newsCategory}::news_category_type, #{newsType}::news_type, now() )
mapper.update: update tbl_news set news_title = #{newsTitle}, news_content = #{newsContent}, news_source_url = #{newsSourceUrl}, news_category = #{newsCategory}::news_category_type, news_type = #{newsType}::news_type, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
